reason: Implementation adds `NoEvidence` status to `EvalStatus`, a `check_task_has_evidence()` function that checks terminal markers and git diff for source changes, and downgrades passed-but-analysis-only tasks to `NoEvidence` (passed=0, failed=0) so they don't inflate the success-rate metric. All 56 existing tests pass, cargo check is clean, and the `--task-log`/`--task-git-base` flags are opt-in so existing callers are unaffected.
